blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt travel to San Siro chasing Norwegian football immortality
Barcelona's 3-0 rout keeps La Liga title pressure on. Arsenal dismantled Tottenham Hotspur 4-1 to stretch 5 points clear at the top. Monday is quiet — Tuesday is anything but.

blocks.label: ⚽ Wed — CL Second Legs
items: ⚽ 21:00 — Monaco vs Paris Saint-Germain (PSG lead 3-2, French derby)
